title: Cannot active toggleRefinement by url filter params
body:
### 🐛 Current behavior

Hi Algolia Team,

We have many clients use `algolia/algoliasearch-magento-2`  [3.13.4, 3.15.0] under Magento 2.4.7 and have found a bug.

We need to override `Algolia_AlgoliaSearch/js/instantsearch` for add `toggleRefinement: []` inside `let allWidgetConfiguration = { .. }` for set key at start.

When use hook `beforeWidgetInitialization` for append widget 'toggleRefinement' for add toggle (On/Off), if i force in url parameter for enable toggle to On directly by URL.

### 🔍 Steps to reproduce

On this production website, (have fixed with override by requirejs-config `algoliaInstantSearch`

Example : https://www.meublesrd.com/en/living-room/sofas-armchairs/sofas?rabais_additionnel=Yes with toggle param `rabais_additionnel` and automatically set active to On value work good.

In this file : https://github.com/algolia/algoliasearch-magento-2/blob/3ecbf4e1313a3b19a85c2c9dc89b027447e0d286/view/frontend/web/js/instantsearch.js#L69
you need update : 
`let allWidgetConfiguration = { infiniteHits: {},`
for : 
`let allWidgetConfiguration = { toggleRefinement: [], infiniteHits: {},`

If toggleRefinement is not setted, the toggle not change to active state with url filter parameter.

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/6ab95d3a-a5a1-433c-98a8-050cb029a952)

### Live reproduction

.

### 💭 Expected behavior

.

### Package version

algolia/algoliasearch-magento-2": "^3.15.0"

### Operating system

_No response_

_No response_
